title: DropHeads
description: this plugin is for 1.21.8-1.21.9 paper only and it drops the players head on death
body: This plugin is made for Paper 1.21.8-1.21.9 servers. When a player dies, their head will automatically drop at the location of their death. It’s simple, lightweight, and perfect for PvP or survival servers that want to add trophies, collectibles, or bragging rights to gameplay. Easy to install, no configuration needed, and fully compatible with other Paper plugins.
